message:
test(search): add property tests for search robot API types (ft-dr6zv.1.6)

8 property tests covering serde roundtrips for all new search API types:
scoring breakdowns, explained hits, stream phase tags, pipeline timing,
watermark info, pipeline status, control results, and explain data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
